operation.add:
Приховування груп атрибутів
Приховування атрибутів

operation.search: $product_attribute_query = $this->db->query("SELECT a.attribute_id, ad.name, pa.text FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product_attribute pa LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute a ON (pa.attribute_id = a.attribute_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_description ad ON (a.attribute_id = ad.attribute_id) WHERE pa.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND ad.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' AND pa.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' ORDER BY a.sort_order, ad.name LIMIT " . (int)$limit);
operation.add: $product_attribute_query = $this->db->query("SELECT a.attribute_id, ad.name, pa.text FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product_attribute pa LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute a ON (pa.attribute_id = a.attribute_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_description ad ON (a.attribute_id = ad.attribute_id) WHERE pa.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND ad.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' AND pa.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' " . ($this->config->get('config_no_attributes') ? " AND pa.attribute_id NOT IN (" . $this->config->get('config_no_attributes') . ") " : ""). " ORDER BY a.sort_order, ad.name LIMIT " . (int)$limit);

operation.search: $product_attribute_query = $this->db->query("SELECT a.attribute_id, ad.name, pa.text FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product_attribute pa LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute a ON (pa.attribute_id = a.attribute_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_description ad ON (a.attribute_id = ad.attribute_id) WHERE pa.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND a.attribute_group_id = '" . (int)$product_attribute_group['attribute_group_id'] . "' AND ad.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' AND pa.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' ORDER BY a.sort_order, ad.name");
operation.add: $product_attribute_query = $this->db->query("SELECT a.attribute_id, ad.name, pa.text FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product_attribute pa LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute a ON (pa.attribute_id = a.attribute_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_description ad ON (a.attribute_id = ad.attribute_id) WHERE pa.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND a.attribute_group_id = '" . (int)$product_attribute_group['attribute_group_id'] . "' AND ad.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' AND pa.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' " . ($this->config->get('config_no_attributes') ? " AND pa.attribute_id NOT IN (" . $this->config->get('config_no_attributes') . ") " : "") . "ORDER BY a.sort_order, ad.name");

operation.search: $product_attribute_group_query = $this->db->query("SELECT ag.attribute_group_id, agd.name FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product_attribute pa LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute a ON (pa.attribute_id = a.attribute_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_group ag ON (a.attribute_group_id = ag.attribute_group_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_group_description agd ON (ag.attribute_group_id = agd.attribute_group_id) WHERE pa.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND agd.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' GROUP BY ag.attribute_group_id ORDER BY ag.sort_order, agd.name");
operation.add: $product_attribute_group_query = $this->db->query("SELECT ag.attribute_group_id, agd.name FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product_attribute pa LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute a ON (pa.attribute_id = a.attribute_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_group ag ON (a.attribute_group_id = ag.attribute_group_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "attribute_group_description agd ON (ag.attribute_group_id = agd.attribute_group_id) WHERE pa.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND agd.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "' " . ($this->config->get('config_no_attributes_group') ? " AND ag.attribute_group_id NOT IN (" . $this->config->get('config_no_attributes_group') . ") " : "") . " GROUP BY ag.attribute_group_id ORDER BY ag.sort_order, agd.name");
